steps.name: gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker@sha256:efdbd755476e7e5eb1077ed6e4bf691f87b38fbded575e9b825f9480374f8f4b
args:
cat > /workspace/Dockerfile <<'DOCKEOF'
FROM busybox:latest
WORKDIR /app
RUN adduser -D appuser
USER appuser
CMD ["echo", "BusyBox container is running!"]
DOCKEOF
echo 'Dockerfile created'

steps.name: gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker@sha256:efdbd755476e7e5eb1077ed6e4bf691f87b38fbded575e9b825f9480374f8f4b
args:
docker buildx create --driver docker-container --name rb-builder --use
docker buildx build \
  --push \
  --platform=linux/amd64,linux/arm64,linux/arm/v7 \
  --tag us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/rbwg-d-demo1025-260304183118/rbw-demo1025-repository/rbev-busybox:buildx-prov-test-image \
  -f /workspace/Dockerfile \
  /workspace
echo 'Multi-platform push complete'

steps.name: gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker@sha256:efdbd755476e7e5eb1077ed6e4bf691f87b38fbded575e9b825f9480374f8f4b
args:
echo '=== Pulling image back to local daemon (amd64 only) ==='
docker pull us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/rbwg-d-demo1025-260304183118/rbw-demo1025-repository/rbev-busybox:buildx-prov-test-image
echo '=== Local images: ==='
docker images | grep rbev-busybox || true
echo '=== Pulled image inspect: ==='
docker inspect us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/rbwg-d-demo1025-260304183118/rbw-demo1025-repository/rbev-busybox:buildx-prov-test-image | jq '.[0].Architecture, .[0].Os' || true
